beats.caption: AC-1 — vazio a toda a largura, sem painel
beats.expectedScreen: the blank /chat welcome centered across the full width: date strip, the 'O que vamos ...' tagline, an onboarding card, a compose box with Anexar/Captura/Cola URL controls; NO right-hand sheet panel anywhere

beats.caption: AC-2 — primeira mensagem enviada
beats.expectedScreen: the layout after the first send: chat transcript rail on the left with the user's IVA question, a side panel entering on the right with a sheet skeleton, the run executing (stop button visible)

actions.text: O que é o IVA em Portugal?

beats.caption: AC-2 — painel entra: cartão e folha
beats.expectedScreen: split layout: transcript on the left with the user question and a compact summary card; the sheet feed panel on the right showing one white sheet with the answer about IVA

beats.caption: AC-3 — cartão com título do modelo
beats.expectedScreen: the summary card in the left transcript upgraded with a bold model-written title plus a one-line summary underneath (no longer a raw first-line placeholder)

beats.caption: AC-4 — chip 'A editar' armado
beats.expectedScreen: the composer with 'torna o tom mais formal' typed and a teal chip above it reading 'A editar: <title>' with a small X dismiss button

beats.caption: AC-4 — revisão enviada
beats.expectedScreen: the revision instruction sent as a user message; the run executing again (stop button visible), the existing sheet still in the right panel

beats.caption: AC-4 — Revisão 2 de 2 na mesma folha
beats.expectedScreen: still ONE sheet in the right panel, its footer now showing revision navigation: left/right chevrons around the label 'Revisão 2 de 2'

beats.caption: AC-5 — chip removido; envio sem destino
beats.expectedScreen: the composer WITHOUT any 'A editar' chip (it was dismissed via its X) and a new run executing (stop button visible)

beats.caption: AC-5 — nova folha criada (2 folhas)
beats.expectedScreen: the sheet feed on the right now holds TWO separate white sheets (the second, newer one highlighted); the left transcript shows the additional turn

beats.caption: AC-6 — restaurado após recarregar
beats.expectedScreen: after a fresh page load the session is fully restored: summary cards with their model titles in the left transcript, both sheets in the right panel
